completed_tasks.name: Record post-execute root-cause findings
completed_tasks.notes: Created 14.2-ROOT-CAUSE-NOTES.md and linked it from STATE.md and 14.2-01-SUMMARY.md.

completed_tasks.name: Re-evaluate heuristic direction against donor intent
completed_tasks.notes: Confirmed Hindsight donor direction is LLM extraction plus normalization, not growth of hand-written preference heuristics.

remaining_tasks.name: Reinstall into live runtime and re-run Discord smoke

blockers.description: Do not move to Phase 15 until the 14.2 root-cause note is addressed or consciously deferred.
blockers.workaround: Follow the root-cause note and fix read/backflow/private recall before any usefulness-scoring work.

decisions.decision: Do not expand Tier-1 heuristics as the main fix.
decisions.rationale: Live evidence shows storage mostly works; the remaining bug is in backflow, packaging, and private recall behavior.

decisions.decision: Keep skill_manage alive for reusable procedures only.
decisions.rationale: The open skill path is intentional. The bug is ownership leakage for personal style/profile facts, not the existence of skills.

decisions.decision: Treat Hindsight as evidence for LLM-plus-normalization memory flow, not for more regex growth.
decisions.rationale: Donor docs and tests point toward extraction + normalization + graph/temporal memory, not hand-written preference pattern growth.

next_action: Resume from the 14.2 root-cause note and implement the non-heuristic follow-up: private recall wrapper, active communication contract, and retrieval-time collapse of overlapping style rows.
context_notes: The executed 14.2 summary overstated closure. Later live Discord evidence proved a remaining bug cluster: internal memory narration leaks to the user, communication rules are stored but not projected back strongly enough, and overlapping style/profile rows are packed too literally. A heuristic-expansion branch was started and intentionally stopped. Existing bounded Tier-1 heuristics remain for now, but must not be expanded.
